description: Lock brain_mapping to the established modern human brain mapping field, not a future-only advanced-AI or connectomics placeholder.

checks.reason: The source-backed field anchor is the NLM-indexed Human Brain Mapping journal start year.
Brain mapping is an interdisciplinary neuroscience research field.
MRI is a concrete non-invasive neuroimaging modality used in human brain mapping.
Brain mapping required common data formats, computerized representations, databases, and information-technology integration.
Established brain mapping predates forecast advanced AI systems.
The concrete imaging dependency is MRI; high-temperature superconductors are too specific and not source-backed for this field-level node.
Connectomics is a specialized neighboring structural-connectivity field, not a prerequisite for broad human brain mapping.
